category_sources: Official site https://proofgeneral.github.io/ describes Proof General as an Emacs interface for proof assistants.
source_facts.description says it is an Emacs-based generic interface for theorem provers.
display_name_sources: Official homepage https://proofgeneral.github.io/ uses the display name Proof General.
source_facts.name provides the package slug proof-general.
docs_sources: Official homepage links to the documentation page under https://proofgeneral.github.io/doc/master/userman/.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/ProofGeneral/PG, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official documentation https://proofgeneral.github.io/doc/master/userman/ describes the interface for interactive proof assistants.
source_facts.description identifies Emacs and theorem provers.
